routineText:
09:00 — Wake up & go to Work
09:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
13:00
13:00 — Black coffee + 1 tsp of sugar

-----------------------
| 14:00 — 🌅 Breakfast
| — whole wheat bread 35g
| — 5 white of eggs boiled
| — 3 yolk of eggs boiled
| — 5g of olive oil
| — mint tea + 1 tsp of sugar
| — cumin & salt
| — oat 35g + water
| — 1 scoop of protein powder
| — 1 avocado 200g whole
-----------------------

14:00 — return to Work
14:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
18:00
18:00 — Out from work

-----------------------
| 18:00 — ☀️ Lunch
| — kefta 90/10 250g
| — khobz complet 35g
| — 300g legume sauté (carrot, courgette, onion)
-----------------------

18:00 — Black Coffee
18:00
      — (4h) Rest or Billard & Water 1L
21:00
21:00 — Back Home

-----------------------
| 21:00 — 🌙 Dinner
| — 1 scoop of protein powder
| — 1 perly nature
| — 2g Almonds
| — 2g Walnuts
| — 2g Cashews
| — 2g Pistachios
| — 1 kiwi
-----------------------

01:00 — Sleep

adjustments.reason: Bread used twice in a day — protocol rule for gas. Khobz at lunch stays; breakfast bread goes.
Adds back the missing 77 kcal / 13g carbs from removing the bread — keeps macros balanced.

verdict.text_html: Near target — 1,738 kcal (−62 vs rest target). All macros in range, but bread used twice — gas risk.

coverage.name: Calories
coverage.note: Right on rest target — within 100 kcal

coverage.name: Protein
coverage.note: Kefta 50g, whey ×2 50g, eggs 26g, rest from oat/bread/perly

coverage.name: Carbs
coverage.note: Oat, khobz ×2, legumes, avocado, kiwi

coverage.name: Fat
coverage.note: Avocado 20g, kefta 20g, egg yolks 13.5g — balanced stack

coverage.name: Fiber
coverage.note: Avocado 9g, legumes 5.5g, oat 3.7g, khobz ×2 4.2g, kiwi 2.4g

coverage.name: Gas / bloat risk
coverage.note: Bread used twice — protocol says once per day max (gas)

coverage.name: Protocol adherence
coverage.note: Bread-twice violation — cumin used ✓, dinner at 21h ✓

coverage.name: Vitamin A
coverage.note: Carrot 100g delivers 835µgRAE — exceptional Vit A day

coverage.name: Selenium
coverage.note: Egg whites + yolks + kefta — selenium fully doubled

coverage.name: Vitamin B12
coverage.note: Kefta 5.5µg + egg yolks 0.9µg — well above daily need

good: All 4 macros in the 'good' zone — protein 95%, carbs 91%, fat 107%, calories 97%
Carrot + egg yolks → Vitamin A at 116% of target
Eggs + kefta → Selenium at 200%, B12 at 267%
3L water logged across 3 blocks — solid hydration
bad: Bread used twice (breakfast + lunch) — gas risk, protocol violation
Omega-3 minimal — walnuts 2g only (0.13g ALA), no fatty fish
Magnesium at 46% of target — structural gap
loggedItems: Whole wheat bread 35g ⚠️ bread used twice

verdict.text_html: Protocol clean — 1,730 kcal (−70 vs rest target). Single bread, macros balanced.
